testimonial1.name: Ahmed Benali
testimonial1.text: Thanks to OOSkills, I was able to learn web development at my own pace. The courses are comprehensive and the instructors are very competent.

testimonial2.name: Fatima Zohra
testimonial2.text: The Excel courses helped me automate many tasks at work. I highly recommend this platform!

testimonial3.name: Karim Messaoudi
testimonial3.text: An accessible and quality platform. The certificates are recognized and helped me land my internship.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Find quick answers to your questions

q1.question: How do I access the courses?
q1.answer: After registration and payment, you have lifetime access to your courses. Simply log in to your account to start learning.

q2.question: Are the certificates recognized?
q2.answer: Yes, each certificate has a QR code for verification and is digitally signed. They are recognized by many companies in Algeria.

q3.question: What payment methods do you accept?
q3.answer: We accept CCP, BaridiMob, and bank transfers. Payment is 100% secure.

q4.question: Can I take courses on mobile?
q4.answer: Absolutely! Our platform is fully responsive and works on all devices: computer, tablet, and smartphone.

q5.question: Is there support if I have problems?
q5.answer: Our support team is available by email and chat. We usually respond within 24 hours.

privacyPolicy.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPolicy.subtitle: We are committed to protecting your privacy and personal data. This policy describes how we collect, use, and protect your information.

s1.title: Data Collection
s1.content:
We collect the information you provide directly when registering on the OOSkills platform, including:

• First and last name
• Email address
• Phone number
• Wilaya (region) of residence
• Profile photo (optional)

We also automatically collect certain technical information such as your IP address, browser type, operating system, and pages visited to improve your experience on our platform.

s2.title: Data Usage
s2.content:
Your personal data is used to:

• Create and manage your user account
• Provide access to purchased courses
• Track your progress and issue certificates
• Send you notifications related to your courses
• Improve our services and platform
• Contact you for technical support
• Send our newsletter (if you have subscribed)

We never sell your personal data to third parties.

s3.title: Cookies and Tracking Technologies
s3.content:
OOSkills uses cookies and similar technologies to:

• Maintain your login session
• Remember your preferences (language, theme)
• Analyze platform usage
• Improve site performance

You can configure your browser to reject cookies, although this may affect some platform features.

s4.title: Data Sharing
s4.content:
We may share your information in the following cases:

• With payment service providers (Chargily Pay) for secure transaction processing
• With hosting and technical infrastructure services
• In response to a legal obligation or court order
• To protect the rights, property, or safety of OOSkills and its users

All our partners are required to respect the confidentiality of your data.

s5.title: Data Security
s5.content:
We implement appropriate technical and organizational security measures to protect your personal data, including:

• SSL/TLS encryption for all data transmissions
• Secure password storage with hashing
• Restricted access to personal data within our team
• Regular backups and disaster recovery plans
• Continuous system monitoring

While we do our best to protect your data, no method of transmission over the Internet is completely secure.

s6.title: Your Rights
s6.content:
In accordance with applicable legislation, you have the following rights:

• Right of access: view the data we hold about you
• Right of rectification: correct inaccurate or incomplete data
• Right of deletion: request the deletion of your account and data
• Right of portability: receive your data in a structured format
• Right to object: object to the processing of your data for marketing purposes

To exercise these rights, contact us at contact@ooskills.com.

s7.title: Children's Privacy
s7.content:
OOSkills is not intended for children under the age of 16. We do not knowingly collect personal data from minors. If you are a parent or guardian and believe your child has provided us with personal information, please contact us immediately.

For users aged 16 to 18, we recommend that parental consent be obtained before registration.

s8.title: Changes to This Policy
s8.content:
We may update this privacy policy from time to time to reflect changes in our practices or for operational, legal, or regulatory reasons.

In case of significant changes, we will notify you by email or through a visible notification on the platform. The last update date will always be indicated at the top of this page.

Your continued use of the platform after changes constitutes your acceptance of the revised policy.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.description: If you have any questions about this privacy policy or how we handle your data, please don't hesitate to contact us.

termsOfService.title: Terms of Service
termsOfService.subtitle: Please read these terms carefully before using the OOSkills platform.

s1.title: Acceptance of Terms
s1.content:
By accessing the OOSkills platform and using our services, you agree to be bound by these terms of service. If you do not accept these terms, please do not use our platform.

These terms constitute a legally binding agreement between you and OOSkills. We recommend that you read them carefully before creating an account.

s2.title: Description of Services
s2.content:
OOSkills is an online learning platform that offers:

• Video and interactive courses in various fields
• Quizzes and assessments to validate your knowledge
• Verifiable certificates upon completion of each course
• A progression and gamification system (XP, badges, rankings)
• A personal progress tracking dashboard

We reserve the right to modify, suspend, or discontinue any aspect of the services at any time.

s3.title: Account Creation
s3.content:
To access our services, you must create an account by providing accurate and complete information. You are responsible for:

• Maintaining the confidentiality of your login credentials
• All activity performed from your account
• Notifying us immediately of any unauthorized use

You must be at least 16 years old to create an account. Only one account per person is allowed.

s4.title: Purchases and Payments
s4.content:
Courses on OOSkills are offered at prices listed in Algerian Dinars (DA). By making a purchase:

• You agree to pay the price displayed at the time of purchase
• Payment is processed securely through our payment partners (Chargily Pay)
• Access to the course is granted after payment confirmation
• Prices may be changed at any time, without affecting already completed purchases

Promo codes are subject to specific conditions and cannot be combined unless otherwise stated.

s5.title: Refund Policy
s5.content:
OOSkills offers refunds under the following conditions:

• You may request a refund within 14 days of purchase
• The request must be made by email to contact@ooskills.com
• A refund may be denied if you have completed more than 30% of the course content
• Refunds are processed via the same payment method used for the purchase
• Processing time is 7 to 14 business days

s6.title: Intellectual Property
s6.content:
All content available on OOSkills is protected by copyright and intellectual property law:

• Videos, texts, quizzes, images, and all other educational materials remain the property of OOSkills and its instructors
• You are granted a personal, non-transferable, and non-exclusive license to access purchased content
• It is strictly prohibited to copy, reproduce, distribute, download, or share content without authorization
• Certificates issued are personal and cannot be transferred

Any violation of these rights may result in account suspension and legal action.

s7.title: Code of Conduct
s7.content:
By using OOSkills, you agree to:

• Not share your login credentials with third parties
• Not attempt to circumvent the platform's security measures
• Not use bots, scripts, or automated tools
• Respect other users and instructors
• Not publish offensive, defamatory, or illegal content
• Not use the platform for unauthorized commercial purposes

Violation of these rules may result in the suspension or permanent deletion of your account.

s8.title: Certificates and Badges
s8.content:
OOSkills certificates and badges are issued under the following conditions:

• A certificate is issued after completing 100% of a course's content and passing the final quiz
• Each certificate has a unique QR code for verification
• Certificates attest to the completion of a course on OOSkills and do not constitute a state-recognized diploma
• OOSkills reserves the right to revoke a certificate in case of fraud or violation of the terms of service

s9.title: Limitation of Liability
s9.content:
OOSkills strives to provide quality service, but:

• We do not guarantee that the service will be uninterrupted or error-free
• Course content is provided for informational and educational purposes
• We are not responsible for decisions made based on course content
• Our liability is limited to the amount you paid for the service in question
• We are not responsible for technical issues related to your Internet connection or equipment

s10.title: Changes to Terms
s10.content:
OOSkills reserves the right to modify these terms of service at any time:

• Changes will be posted on this page with an update date
• For significant changes, we will notify you by email
• Your continued use of the platform after changes constitutes your acceptance of the new terms
• If you do not accept the new terms, you must stop using the platform and delete your account

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.description: If you have any questions about these terms of service, please don't hesitate to contact us.
